speakers.name: Frances Cole
speakers.credentials: GP by background; Pain Rehabilitation Specialist
speakers.bio: Frances Cole is a GP by background, pain rehabilitation specialist, and co-founder of Live Well with Pain. She established what is recognised as the first CBT-based multidisciplinary pain rehabilitation service within UK primary care in 1996, championing a biopsychosocial, person-centred approach to persistent pain long before it became mainstream. Frances is the author of several books on pain and rehabilitation, most recently An Introduction to Living Well with Pain: 10 Footsteps to Guide Self-Management, and her work has helped improve access to practical pain self-management support for patients and clinicians across the UK. Frances will be stepping down from Live Well with Pain at the end of March 2026.
speakers.citation_short: Frances Cole is a GP by background, pain rehabilitation specialist, and co-founder of Live Well with Pain. She established what is recognised as the first CBT-based multidisciplinary pain rehabilitation service within UK primary care in 1996 and is the author of several books, most recently An Introduction to Living Well with Pain: 10 Footsteps to Guide Self-Management. Frances will be stepping down from Live Well with Pain at the end of March 2026.
